name: Angela Smoak

contactInfo.office: 102 W. Austin St., Suite 201, Jefferson, TX 75657

bio: Angela Smoak serves as the County Attorney for Marion County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county. She is committed to ensuring justice and public safety in the Jefferson area.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases in Marion County
Protect the legal interests of county government
Support crime victims and their families
Maintain fiscal responsibility in the county attorney's office
Work with law enforcement to address community safety concerns
